title: SMACH and Mermaid diagram validator with YAML parsing
purpose: Validates diagram content to ensure it conforms to SMACH YAML structure or Mermaid syntax. Used to verify diagram integrity before processing.
module_context: Exports an interface ValidationResult and utility functions isSmachYaml and validateSmachYaml. Contains a Validator class with an async validate method that handles both SMACH and Mermaid validation.

steps.content: Test if the content matches the SMACH YAML pattern starting with 'smach_diagram:'
Return true if the pattern is found, false otherwise
Attempt to parse the YAML content into a JavaScript object
IF parsing fails, return a validation error with the parse error message
Verify that the parsed object contains a smach_diagram root
IF smach_diagram is missing, return a validation error indicating the missing root
Ensure that smach_diagram contains exactly one root StateMachine
IF multiple or no root StateMachines are found, return a validation error with details
Validate that the root StateMachine is an object
IF the root StateMachine is not an object, return a validation error
Confirm that the root StateMachine is of type StateMachine
IF the root StateMachine is not of type StateMachine, return a validation error
Ensure that the root StateMachine has at least one state
IF no states are present, return a validation error
Verify that the root StateMachine has an initial_state defined
IF initial_state is missing, return a validation error
Confirm that the root StateMachine has outcomes defined
IF outcomes are missing, return a validation error
Return a successful validation result if all checks pass
IF the content is empty or only whitespace, return a validation error indicating the diagram cannot be empty
Check if the content is SMACH YAML by testing for the smach_diagram pattern
IF the content is SMACH YAML, validate it using the validateSmachYaml function
ELSE attempt to dynamically import the mermaid library
IF the import fails, return a validation error indicating invalid mermaid syntax
Try to parse the diagram content using the mermaid parser
IF parsing fails, extract line number from error message if available
IF parsing fails, return a validation error with the error message and line number
Return a successful validation result if parsing succeeds
